title: hedyotis remyi
intro: Hedyotis remyi, also known as Baguio marigold or Baguio hedyotis, is a flowering plant species native to the Philippines. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Hedyotis remyi include its potential to treat fever, cough, and other respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Hedyotis remyi is often prepared as a decoction or infused in hot water for medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
